core_instructions: Strictly maintain the facial features, skin tone, and overall likeness of the woman in the reference image in all generated variations. Ensure the nihongami hairstyle and the specific details of the black silk kimono are preserved.

visual_details.clothing: High-quality black silk kimono featuring intricate gold, white, and peach floral embroidery and patterns; a white under-collar (han-eri) is visible at the neck; a wide, ornate orange and red obi belt is secured with decorative cords and complex floral ornaments.
visual_details.accessories: Multiple ornate kanzashi hairpins including a silver floral comb, white flower ornaments, and dangling metallic birabira charms; long dangling earrings composed of red and white beads.
visual_details.style: Traditional Japanese portrait with a modern cinematic aesthetic, emphasizing high contrast, rich textures, and a tranquil, sophisticated mood.
visual_details.lighting: Dramatic backlighting from the large glowing lantern creating a warm rim light around the subject's silhouette; soft, directional front lighting that highlights the textures and colors of the kimono and makeup.
visual_details.face: The face, facial structure, features, skin tone, and expression must match the reference image exactly.
visual_details.posing: Three-quarter profile view, standing with the head tilted slightly downward in a demure and graceful posture; hands are held together near the waist resting on the obi.
visual_details.subject: A young East Asian woman with a serene and elegant appearance, wearing traditional Japanese attire.
visual_details.hair: The hair color, length, style, and texture must match the reference image exactly.
visual_details.environment: Dark, atmospheric indoor setting; a large, luminous spherical paper lantern with a black wire grid serves as the primary backdrop; branches of white cherry blossoms (sakura) are arranged around the lantern, framing the subject.
visual_details.camera: Medium shot from a slightly low angle; shallow depth of field focusing on the woman's face and upper body; high-resolution detail with a soft, cinematic blur in the background.

usage_hint: Pass this template to any image generator agent with an image reference.
